description: Smartphone UI with Command-X neural messaging, iMessage-style texting, NPC profiles, a persistent Quests app, a Map app for tracking contact locations, the Nova agentic assistant (connection-profile swap, per-chat transcript, skill packs, approval-gated tool calls, soul/memory self-edit), and in-phone settings. Uses prompt injection for structured [sms], [status], [quests], and [place] tag extraction.
